Essay AS0092
abstract: Handled 10 million twenty-foot cargoes by February 2025, the world’s largest fully automated container terminal, Tuas Port in Singapore, attracts people’s attention to the maritime industry and its automation. (PSA Singapore, 2025) Regarded as the backbone of globalization, the maritime industry transports more than 80% of global trade. (UNCTAD, 2025)
